steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the mihrab is foundational to traditional mosque architecture and that 'therefore' it is considered a certain aspect of design. 'therefore' signals the blank restates 'foundational' — something definitively essential. The second sentence reinforces this by noting that even mosques combining multiple architectural styles still include several of these standard features.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — an unprecedented: Means never seen before — contradicts the foundational, long-established role of the mihrab. ✗
  • Choice B — an embellished: Describes decoration or ornamentation, not structural or essential importance. ✗
  • Choice C — an imposing: Describes visual scale or grandeur, not whether something is definitively essential to a tradition. ✗
  • Choice D — a quintessential: Means 'the most perfect or typical example of' — directly extends 'foundational' by expressing that the mihrab is definitively essential and characteristic of mosque design. ✓
D is correct.
